category_sources: Official GitHub repo describes tfschema as a schema inspector for Terraform/OpenTofu providers.
source_facts.description says it is a schema inspector for Terraform/OpenTofu providers.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title uses minamijoyo/tfschema.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo both point to the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/minamijoyo/tfschema, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names Terraform/OpenTofu providers and schema inspection.
source_facts.executables lists tfschema as a command-line executable.
